name: Hole In One Golf Center
about: Hole In One Golf Center is an indoor golf facility featuring advanced golf simulators and a full-service golf academy. The center offers approximately 95 different courses on state-of-the-art simulators with realistic 3D visuals and advanced ball tracking technology. It operates as a one-stop shop for golfers, providing instruction, club fitting, sales, and custom club services. The facility is known for its professional expertise, particularly through Dustin Jones PGA instruction, and welcomes golfers of all skill levels to practice year-round regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional club fitting services with personalized attention
Access to 95+ famous golf courses with realistic 3D visuals
Year-round indoor play unaffected by weather
Expert PGA instruction available for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Vending food and beverages are available
Please contact for latest information on alcohol availability

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own real clubs, which are necessary for the most realistic golf experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Vending food and beverages are available. Alcohol availability should be confirmed by calling ahead.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It generally takes about an hour per person, so two people would take approximately 2 hours to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly? Can beginners play?
faq.answer: Yes, the simulators are perfect for practice and learning. Beginners and first-time players are welcome.

opening_hours: Friday 10am-5pm | Saturday 10am-4pm | Friday 10am-5pm | Saturday 10am-4pm | Friday 10am-5pm | Saturday 10am-4pm | Friday 10am-5pm
